hero.title: Zvirongwa zvekuwanika kwevanhu vose
hero.lead: Iyi rejista inonyora mapurojekiti eruzhinji anochengetwa kuburikidza neIATF. Zvirongwa zvinogamuchirwa zvekuwanika, zvivakwa zvesaiti, uye zvinyorwa zvakachengetwa zvinochengetwa pano.

intro: Zvirongwa zvakagamuchirwa zvinorondedzerwa pano kana zvangobudiswa.

header.title: Kushandura chinodikanwa chaicho chokuwanika kuva chirongwa chevoruzhinji

paragraphs: IATF inoongorora zvinodikanwa zvekuwanika izvo zvinogona kushandurwa kuita basa rinobatsira revanhu rakavhurika.

emptyState.title: Hapana mapurojekiti akabudiswa
paragraphs: IATF iri kugadzirira purogiramu yayo yokutanga yevoruzhinji.
Uchiri kukwanisa kutumira chikumbiro kana uine chimwe chinhu chaunoda kuti chiitwe.
